title: HALO soundtracks MC
description: This resource pack is a collection of soundtracks from the HALO games series that you can hear in the background of the game and even on the music discs. Selected from all parts in a row, including not first-person shooters. Now there are panoramas here.
body:
This resourcepack is a collection of soundtracks from the HALO games series that you can hear in the background of the game and even on the music discs. There will definitely be changes, if necessary, of course. Now there are partial panoramas here, depending on which version you choose.
[Demonstration is here](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1HTK1uTBLN8OrcDwB9VMUKm6T2tfs7wUr)
